headline: TD Cowen Trims Price Target on CME Group (CME). Here is Why
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 2.31%, CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) is included among the 12 Best NASDAQ Stocks to Buy for Dividends. CME Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CME) is the world’s leading and most diverse derivatives marketplace offering the widest range of futures and options products for risk management. On June 22, TD Cowen lowered its price […]

headline: Wall Street likes what DraftKings just took away from itself
summary: DraftKings (DKNG) turned on its own prediction markets exchange this week, a shift the company has been engineering since last fall. For seven months, every contract traded on DraftKings Predictions ran through somebody else’s infrastructure. Now DraftKings owns the plumbing. Since DraftKings ...
